title: DPE Tool meta.json
description: Schema for every tool's meta.json — runner uses this to resolve and invoke the tool.

name.description: Tool name; referenced from pipeline stages.

version.description: Semver string. Recorded in stages.json for traceability.

runtime.description: How the runner invokes this tool.

entry.description: Relative path (from tool dir) to the built executable. Preferred — runner tries this first.

run.description: Fallback command for dev mode (e.g. 'bun src/main.ts'). Runner uses this when entry is missing.

build.description: Command used to produce the entry binary. Documentation/CI only — runner does not build.

test.description: Command to run the tool's own tests. Documentation/CI only.

settings_schema.description: Optional relative path to a JSON Schema file describing this tool's settings. When present, `check` validates pipeline-provided settings against it.
